{"credits": [{"type": "coordinator", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/7559821?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyberschnaps/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyberschnaps/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyberschnaps/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyberschnaps/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/cyberschnaps", "id": 7559821, "login": "cyberschnaps", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc1NTk4MjE=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyberschnaps/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyberschnaps/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyberschnaps/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyberschnaps/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyberschnaps/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyberschnaps", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-23891", "cvss": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:L/SC:H/SI:H/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Impact
A stored code execution vulnerability in the user name field allows a low-privileged attacker to execute arbitrary code in the context of any user who passively visits a comment page, resulting in high confidentiality and integrity impact across security boundaries.

### Patches
N/A

### Workarounds
Not available

### References
OWASP ASVS v4.0.3-5.1.3

### Credits
This issue was discovered in a security audit organized by [octree](https://octree.ch/) and made by [Secu Labs](https://seculabs.ch/) against Decidim financed by the city of Lausanne (Switzerland).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00356, "percentile": 0.27528}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fc46-r95f-hq7g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-13T16:35:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fc46-r95f-hq7g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fc46-r95f-hq7g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-23891"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-13T17:16:28Z", "published_at": "2026-04-13T16:35:13Z", "references": ["https://github.com/decidim/decidim/security/advisories/GHSA-fc46-r95f-hq7g", "https://github.com/decidim/decidim/releases/tag/v0.30.5", "https://github.com/decidim/decidim/releases/tag/v0.31.1", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23891", "https://github.com/rubysec/ruby-advisory-db/blob/master/gems/decidim-core/CVE-2026-23891.yml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fc46-r95f-hq7g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/decidim/decidim/security-advisories/GHSA-fc46-r95f-hq7g", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/decidim/decidim", "summary": "Decidim has a cross-site scripting (XSS) in user name", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T16:14:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fc46-r95f-hq7g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.31.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "decidim-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.31.0.rc1, < 0.31.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.30.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "decidim-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.30.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Decidim has a cross-site scripting (XSS) in user name
